ast.name: error
ast.source: No collapsed state found on view.
ast.target: 未找到视图的折叠状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Each toggle controls whether commands should be added to collapse and expand that view, or global which operates on all available views.
ast.target: 每个开关控制是否应添加用于折叠和展开该视图的命令，或全局命令，该命令作用于所有可用视图。
